scripts.patch: bash -c "npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --prefix Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && VERSION=$(node -p 'require(\"./Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment/package.json\").version') && git add Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment/package.json && git commit -m 'release v'$VERSION && git tag -f v$VERSION && git push origin HEAD && git push origin v$VERSION"
scripts.minor: bash -c "npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --prefix Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && VERSION=$(node -p 'require(\"./Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment/package.json\").version') && git add Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment/package.json && git commit -m 'release v'$VERSION && git tag -f v$VERSION && git push origin HEAD && git push origin v$VERSION"
scripts.major: bash -c "npm version major --no-git-tag-version --prefix Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && VERSION=$(node -p 'require(\"./Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment/package.json\").version') && git add Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment/package.json && git commit -m 'release v'$VERSION && git tag -f v$VERSION && git push origin HEAD && git push origin v$VERSION"
